response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON only contained lyrics for 'Ai no Scenario' and missed the intro song 'ZIG-ZAG'. Handled the discrepancy via manual transcription. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the 'Ai no Scenario' lyrics while manually transcribing the 'ZIG-ZAG' sections. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to vocal cord onset times. The title card of the song is treated as a visual trigger.

subtitles.original: 抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Embrace me...

subtitles.original: 壊すけどいいの？
subtitles.english: Even if I destroy you, is that okay?

subtitles.original: 囚われたい私の
subtitles.english: Of me, who wants to be imprisoned...

subtitles.original: デス デス デデ デス！
subtitles.english: Death, death, de-de-death!

subtitles.original: 夢の中で君と手を繋いでいるの
subtitles.english: In my dreams, I am holding hands with you...

subtitles.original: 何も知らないあの頃の二人のままで
subtitles.english: ...just as we were back then, when we knew nothing.

subtitles.original: でも分かっているよ すぐに覚めてしまうと
subtitles.english: But I know that I will wake up soon.

subtitles.original: それならいっそ 君の手をそっと 閉じ込めさせて
subtitles.english: In that case, let me gently lock your hand away.

subtitles.original: ほら
subtitles.english: Look!

subtitles.original: 今 今 今
subtitles.english: Right now, now, now!

subtitles.original: 奪いたい痛いな
subtitles.english: I want to steal you away so much, it hurts.

subtitles.original: 奇跡とかちょっと望んじゃってもいいやいやいやいや
subtitles.english: It's fine even if I wish for a bit of a miracle.

subtitles.original: タチが悪いわ
subtitles.english: How malicious.

subtitles.original: 冷めない冷めない冷めない
subtitles.english: I won't wake up, won't wake up, won't wake up!

subtitles.original: おかしなとこ全部えぐり取って
subtitles.english: Gouge out all the strange parts.

subtitles.original: 薄情だって結構 好きに呼んでいいよ Sung
subtitles.english: If you call me heartless, that's fine too. Call me whatever you like.

subtitles.original: 醒める前にバイバイしたいの
subtitles.english: I want to say goodbye before I wake up.

subtitles.original: デス デス デデ デス デス デス デデ デス！
subtitles.english: Death, death, de-de-death! Death, death, de-de-death!

subtitles.original: 世界欺く揺るぎない正義
subtitles.english: The unwavering justice that deceives this world...

subtitles.original: ほどいて真実この手の中
subtitles.english: ...I'll unravel the truth, into these hands.

subtitles.original: アイのシナリオ
subtitles.english: [Ai no Scenario]

subtitles.original: 大胆不敵な影が華麗に踊る
subtitles.english: An audacious shadow dances elegantly.

subtitles.original: 君が隠してる秘密いつか聞かせてよ
subtitles.english: Tell me someday about the secret you're hiding.

subtitles.original: 伸ばした手で触れる事は誰にもできない
subtitles.english: No one can touch it with their outstretched hand...

subtitles.original: 君が隠してる世界僕に見させてよ
subtitles.english: ...so let me see the world you're hiding.

subtitles.original: 揺れる難解な心
subtitles.english: A troubled, wavering heart...

subtitles.original: 解き明かして奪うその瞳
subtitles.english: ...I'll dispel it and steal away those eyes.

subtitles.original: 不安がって泣いてたって 見つけらんないよ
subtitles.english: Even if you cry in fear, you won't find it.

subtitles.original: 狙う真実は
subtitles.english: The truth I was aiming for...

subtitles.original: どこへ消えた
subtitles.english: ...where did it vanish to?

subtitles.original: たとえ世界欺く解答だとしても Mom
subtitles.english: Even if it were an answer that deceives the world...

subtitles.original: 「信じて」差し出す掌
subtitles.english: ...trust me and reach out your hand.

subtitles.original: 決して逃げない怖くはないから
subtitles.english: I'll never run away, because I'm not scared.

subtitles.original: 目を開け弱さをかき消すんだ
subtitles.english: I'll open my eyes and drown out my weakness!

subtitles.original: 繰り返される運命に君は気づいてる？
subtitles.english: Are you beginning to realize how repetitive this fate is?

subtitles.original: 僕が隠してる秘密いつか聞かせるよ
subtitles.english: Someday I'll tell you the secret I'm hiding.

subtitles.original: 歩み寄る偽りの影君は知らない
subtitles.english: A deceptive shadow is approaching, but you don't know.

subtitles.original: 芽生えた記憶は絡む必然の棘で
subtitles.english: Budding memories are entangled by thorns of inevitability.

subtitles.original: 守りたい想いで
subtitles.english: With just the desire to protect...

subtitles.original: ただ立ち向かって解くその絆
subtitles.english: ...I'll take a stand and unravel this bond!

subtitles.original: 何度だって助けるって揺るぎはしないよ
subtitles.english: I'll save you as many times as it takes; I'll never waver!

subtitles.original: 隠す真実は
subtitles.english: The hidden truth...

subtitles.original: どこへ消えた
subtitles.english: ...where did it vanish to?

subtitles.original: たとえ世界を敵に回したとしても
subtitles.english: Even if you make an enemy of the entire world...

subtitles.original: 信じて僕だけ未来も
subtitles.english: ...believe only in me and the future!

subtitles.original: 決して逃げない迷いはないから
subtitles.english: I'll never run away, because there's no doubt in me.

subtitles.original: シナリオ壊して抗うんだ
subtitles.english: I'll break the scenario and fight back!
